title: Apple in Early Settlement Talks With DOJ Over Antitrust Case
description: Apple Inc. and the US Justice Department are in early discussions about settling a 2024 lawsuit that alleges the iPhone maker violated antitrust laws.

title: Netflix Shares Tumble After Forecast for Slowing Growth
description: Netflix Inc. shares fell after the company forecast a second consecutive quarter of slowing sales growth, contributing to investor anxiety about the streaming giant’s future.

title: IPhone Hacking Firm Sues Ex-Worker Over Alleged Theft of Secrets
description: Magnet Forensics Inc., a Canadian cybersecurity firm, accused a former contractor of sharing trade secrets about a previously unknown flaw used to hack iPhones with a rival firm.
